subject: Stand up the KAN board cadence: a weekly planning ritual and board hygiene policy

pass_if: KAN board has named columns (Backlog/Ready/In-Progress/Review/Done) with WIP limits documented
A recurring weekly planning + standup cadence is defined with day/time and owner
Board-hygiene rules (stale-card SLA, definition-of-done) are written and linked
fail_if: Cadence has no fixed schedule or owner

subject: Produce the 15-agent rollout plan with phased waves and ownership

pass_if: All 15 agents enumerated with an owner and a target wave
Rollout sequenced into >=3 phased waves with entry/exit criteria per wave
Each wave has a go/no-go gate tied to the durability rubric
fail_if: No phasing or no gate criteria
Any agent lacks a named owner

subject: Establish cross-function delivery tracking linking manager outcomes to coworker tasks

pass_if: A single tracker maps each manager-tier outcome to its dispatched coworker DurableTasks
An escalation path for blocked items is defined with an owner and SLA
fail_if: Outcomes and tasks are not linked

subject: Cross-manager dedup + collision-prevention policy (ratify product O2 vs design B)

pass_if: Ratified single-owner: product owns claude-cowork-linux devcontainer (O2 / KAN-43); design builds design function only (A / KAN-44)
Scan of all data/queues/*.jsonl + manager outcomes finds no two managers targeting the same output path; any collisions listed with one assigned owner
Collision-prevention policy written: before any manager dispatches file-writing work, project-manager checks output-path overlap first

subject: Nightly cross-queue review + morning rollup + durability gate runner

pass_if: Nightly job defined: scans all data/queues/*.jsonl, lists blocked + stale (>24h in_progress), dispatches routine maintenance
Morning rollup defined: per-function completed/pending -> single operator summary
Gate wired to ci-cd/gate.py + ci-cd/RUBRIC.md: a completed task counts only if its evaluator pass_if holds, else transition back to coworker
fail_if: no nightly scan over all queues
gate not tied to durability rubric
